zh.Aix-en-Diois, Die, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, F: 法國o-阿爾培斯德o姆艾--迪瓦斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Malberjone Artaud d'Aix於大約1215年出生在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾豪-阿爾培斯蒙特莫爾時，她的父親Pierre Idosad Artaud of Aix Lord of Aix en diois31歲，母親Dragonnette de Montauban16歲。她於1239年6月17日與Raymond Ier des Baux-Orange在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾瓦歐可盧斯奧拉結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1307年之後在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾瓦歐可盧斯奧拉。

zh-hans.Montmaur, Hautes-Alpes, Provence-Alpes-C: 法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾豪-阿爾培斯蒙特莫爾

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Malberjone Artaud d'Aix于大约1215年出生在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾豪-阿爾培斯蒙特莫爾时，她的父亲Pierre Idosad Artaud of Aix Lord of Aix en diois31岁，母亲Dragonnette de Montauban16岁。她于1239年6月17日与Raymond Ier des Baux-Orange在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾瓦歐可盧斯奧拉结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1307年之后在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾瓦歐可盧斯奧拉。

nameMeanings.name: Artaud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Michel, Antoine, Jacques, Altagrace, Anatole, Andre, Angelle, Christophe, Lucien, Philippe.

French: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements arn ‘eagle’ + wald ‘rule, power’ (see Arnold ). This surname is also found in the Dominican Republic and Haiti. Compare Renaud and Reneau .
History: This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Arnoux
meanings: Altered form of French Arnould, a variant of Arnaud .
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Arnwulf, composed of the elements arn ‘eagle’ + wulf ‘wolf’.

variants.name: Arnoult
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jacques, Patrice, Pierre.

variants.name: Arnold
meanings: English, Scottish, German, Dutch, French (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), Hungarian, Czech, Slovak, Polish, Croatian, and Slovenian: from the ancient Germanic personal name Arnwald (Middle English Arnold, Old French Arnaut), composed of the elements arn ‘eagle’ + wald ‘rule, power’. This name was introduced to Britain by the Normans.
English: habitational name from either of two places called Arnold in Nottinghamshire and East Yorkshire, from Old English earn ‘eagle’ + halh ‘nook’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): adoption of the German personal name (see 1 above), at least in part on account of its resemblance to the Jewish name   Aaron  .

nameMeanings.name: d'Aix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: probably a variant of   Deis   1.
Probably an altered form of Portuguese Días (see Dias ).
African American: probably an altered form of English   Days  .

variants.name: Deis
meanings: from a short form of the personal name Matthias or Matthäus (see Matthew ).

en.lifeSummary: When Malberjone Artaud d'Aix was born about 1215, in Montmaur, Hautes-Alpes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, her father, Pierre Idosad Artaud of Aix Lord of Aix en diois, was 31 and her mother, Dragonnette de Montauban, was 16. She married Raymond Ier des Baux-Orange on 17 June 1239, in Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died after 1307, in Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Malberjone Artaud d'Aix est née environ 1215, à Montmaur, Hautes-Alpes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, son père, Pierre Idosad Artaud of Aix Lord of Aix en diois, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Dragonnette de Montauban, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Raymond Ier des Baux-Orange le 17 juin 1239, à Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée après 1307, à Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Malberjone Artaud d'Aix um 1215 in Montmaur, Hautes-Alpes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Pierre Idosad Artaud of Aix Lord of Aix en diois 31 und ihre Mutter Dragonnette de Montauban 16. Sie hat am 17. Juni 1239 in Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich Raymond Ier des Baux-Orange geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1307 in Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Malberjone Artaud d'Aix è nata il circa 1215 nel Montmaur, Hautes-Alpes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, sua padre, Pierre Idosad Artaud of Aix Lord of Aix en diois, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Dragonnette de Montauban, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Raymond Ier des Baux-Orange il 17 giugno 1239, nel Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì dopo il 1307, nel Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Malberjone Artaud d'Aixが約1215年にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルハウテス-アルペスモントマアウルで生まれた時，父Pierre Idosad Artaud of Aix Lord of Aix en dioisは31歳，母Dragonnette de Montaubanは16歳であった。1239年6月17日にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルヴァウクルゼオランッジでRaymond Ier des Baux-Orangeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1307年以後にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルヴァウクルゼオランッジで死去した。

ko.Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône,: 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 부체스-드-ho니 레스 바스-데-프로븐스
ko.lifeSummary: Malberjone Artaud d'Aix(이)가 대략 1215년 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 하츠-알프스 몽모르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Pierre Idosad Artaud of Aix Lord of Aix en diois(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dragonnette de Montauban(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1239년 6월 17일 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 바c루스 오랑에서 Raymond Ier des Baux-Orange(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1307년 이후 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 바c루스 오랑에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Malberjone Artaud d'Aix nasceu aproximadamente 1215, em Montmaur, Hautes-Alpes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França, seu pai, Pierre Idosad Artaud of Aix Lord of Aix en diois, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Dragonnette de Montauban, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Raymond Ier des Baux-Orange em 17 de junho de 1239, em Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu após 1307, em Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França.

ru.Les Baux-de-Provence, Bouches-du-Rhône,: лесь баукс-де-провенс, боучес-ду-рoн, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Malberjone Artaud d'Aix родилась около 1215 г. в местности монтмаур, хаутес-алпесь, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция, её отцу по имени Pierre Idosad Artaud of Aix Lord of Aix en diois было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Dragonnette de Montauban, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Raymond Ier des Baux-Orange 17 июня 1239 г. в местности оранг, вауклус, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла после 1307 г. в местности оранг, вауклус, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция.

Se casó con Raymond Ier des Baux-Orange el 17 de junio de 1239, en Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió después de 1307, en Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia.
